rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The test file passed all 15 tests but had 13 lint errors, causing FAIL verification — always run lint checks before marking a stage done.","scope":"tests/int/auth-protected-routes.int.spec.ts"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"`as any` on mockPayload bypasses type checking in stubs — prefer explicit interface types for mock objects to catch contract mismatches early.","scope":"src/auth/AuthService"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Co-located unit test (src/auth/withAuth.test.ts) was planned but never created — track sub-deliverables explicitly to avoid incomplete implementations.","scope":"test planning"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Pre-existing typecheck errors in api.int.spec.ts surfaced during this stage — unrelated failures can block review even when your changeset is correct.","scope":"CI review"}]}
